Ukraine: Russian-Run Schools Violate Children's Rights

July 16, 2026 9:00AM EDT | Report

Systematic Effort in Occupied Territory to Erase Ukrainian Identity

Share this via Facebook

Russian occupation authorities have systematically reorganized schools in occupied Ukrainian territory over the past four years, Human Rights Watch said in a report released today.

The 120-page report documents a pattern of curriculum changes, language suppression, and forced re-registration spanning multiple school years.

Region / Country
  • Ukraine
Topic
  • Education
